overrides.reason: Halves the lightning special-attack damage from Rune dragons.
The petrifying gaze drains your combat stats every hit unless a mirror shield is worn.
The scream drains multiple combat stats and hits harder without ear protection.
The stench hits through prayer and rapidly drains combat stats without a nose peg.
The dust and smoke prevent safe combat and drain your stats without face protection.
It grabs and damages you unless your head is protected by a spiny helmet.
Its caustic spit burns your eyes, draining Attack and Defence heavily without eye protection.
It takes damage only while a lit bug lantern is equipped in the shield slot.
